name: Perch (i) (SS-176)
events: 10 Dec 1941 USS Perch (Lt.Cdr. David Albert Hurt) left Manila for her first war patrol.

27 Dec 1941 USS Perch (Lt.Cdr. David Albert Hurt) torpedoed and damaged the Japanese supply ship Noshima (7190 GRT) in the South China Sea in position 22°14'N, 115°13'E. Perch was damaged by depth charges during this attack and she went to Darwin, Australia to repair the damage.
